ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* The date for which the stock data is recorded */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* The opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* The highest price reached during the day */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* The lowest price reached during the day */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* The closing price of the stock at the end of the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* The volume of trades on the given date */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock's unique identifier */,
  "adj_open_price" TEXT /* Adjusted opening price for dividend and splits */,
  "adj_high_price" TEXT /* Adjusted high price for dividend and splits */,
  "adj_low_price" TEXT /* Adjusted low price for dividend and splits */,
  "adj_close_price" TEXT /* Adjusted closing price for dividend and splits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* The stock symbol used for trading */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* The name of the company listed */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The sector the company belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The industry the company operates in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* The market capitalization of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend payment */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock that paid the dividend */,
  "date_announced" TEXT /* Date the dividend was announced */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the dividend payment */,
  "dividend_type" TEXT /* Type of dividend (e.g., cash, stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock that underwent a split */,
  "date_announced" TEXT /* Date the stock split was announced */,
  "split_ratio" TEXT /* The ratio of the stock split */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* The full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, investor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, monthly, annual) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_type FOREIGN KEY ("report_type") REFERENCES report_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's permissions and responsibilities */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  "report_template" TEXT /* Template used to generate the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock the data is for */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date the data was imported */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the imported data */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., success, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corporate_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corporate action */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock involved in the action */,
  "date_announced" TEXT /* Date the corporate action was announced */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of corporate action (e.g., merger, acquisition) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the corporate action */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the action on the stock price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corporate_actions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the security setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the security setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the security setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., login, data import) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who triggered the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_calendar" (
  "calendar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calendar entry */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading day */,
  "market_status" TEXT /* Status of the market (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calendar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_calendar_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)
